title: AYU_ep01
synopsis: 夜深人靜，街角的「阿與麵線攤」依舊燈火通明。粗獷的老闆阿與在熱氣蒸騰的攤位前，用他獨特的風格招呼著客人，而一位面生的大學生，正怯生生地觀察著他。

new_characters.name: AYU_ayu
new_characters.tags: messy short hair, round black glasses, sweating, muscular build, old yellow t-shirt, rough face

new_characters.name: university_student
new_characters.tags: young man, thick backpack, nervous expression, timid, black hair, black eyes, average build

panels.prompt: wide shot, night, street corner, old noodle stand, city lights, neon signs, steam rising, empty chairs, establishing shot

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text:
夜深了
城市的霓虹逐漸轉暗

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text:
但在這不起眼的街角
一盞昏黃的燈泡
依舊倔強地亮著

panels.prompt: 1boy, sweating, messy short hair, round black glasses, focused expression, steam, close-up, from below
1boy, strong hands, stirring noodles, giant stainless steel pot, steam, mid shot

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text:
這裡是
「阿與麵線攤」

panels.prompt: solo, red plastic chair, pulled out, street corner background, night, low angle

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text:
空氣中瀰漫著
柴魚高湯的鮮甜

panels.prompt: 1boy, back shot, old yellow t-shirt, rough face, yelling, noodle stand background, steam, speed lines

dialogues.speaker: AYU_ayu
dialogues.text:
吵死了！
要吃自己找位子坐！

panels.prompt: solo, a person pulling a red plastic chair, street corner, night

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text:
常客拉開紅色塑膠椅
大聲喊道

dialogues.speaker: unseen_customer
dialogues.text:
老闆
一碗綜合，大腸多一點
不要香菜！

panels.prompt: 1boy, strong hands, thick calluses, scissors cutting intestines, ladle, noodle pot, steam, close-up, motion blur

dialogues.speaker: AYU_ayu
dialogues.text: 沒看到老子在忙嗎！

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 喀嚓喀嚓

panels.prompt: 1boy, throwing ladle, noodle stand background, steam, speed lines
1boy, hand reaching into orange ice bucket, grabbing beer bottle, close-up
1boy, biting open beer bottle cap, focused expression, close-up

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 啵

panels.prompt: 1boy, chugging beer, head tilted back, sweat, strong neck, beer foam, close-up, dramatic lighting

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 咕嚕

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 咕嚕

panels.prompt: 1boy, wiping mouth with hand, satisfied expression, beer foam on face, noodle stand background, mid shot

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 哈！

panels.prompt: wide shot, noodle stand, night, a young man with a heavy backpack standing hesitantly at the entrance, establishing shot

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text:
對阿與來說
這酒
才是他撐過夜晚的燃料

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text:
這時
攤子前來了一個面生的大學生

panels.prompt: 1boy, nervous expression, timid, heavy backpack, looking at noodle stand, close-up
1boy, squinting eyes, looking through foggy glasses, rough face, serious expression, close-up, dramatic shadow

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text:
阿與瞇起眼睛
打量著眼前的年輕人

panels.prompt: 1boy, slamming empty beer bottle on table, powerful motion, close-up, impact lines

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 砰！

panels.prompt: 1boy, shrinking back, scared expression, wide eyes, close-up, speed lines

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text:
大學生嚇得
縮了縮脖子

panels.prompt: 1boy, turning his back, rough silhouette, noodle stand background, mid shot
1boy, strong hands, ladle scooping noodles into a large ceramic bowl, steam, close-up
1boy, hands adding oysters, intestines, garlic paste and chili sauce generously into a noodle bowl, close-up, delicious looking food
1boy, forcefully placing a steaming noodle bowl on a stainless steel table, soup splashing slightly, impact lines, wide shot

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 碰！

panels.prompt: 1boy, startled, confused expression, looking at the noodle bowl, close-up

dialogues.speaker: university_student
dialogues.text: 老、老闆……

panels.prompt: 1boy, stammering, looking up at ayu (off-panel), nervous, close-up

dialogues.speaker: university_student
dialogues.text: 我還沒點……

panels.prompt: 1boy, ignoring the student, opening another beer bottle, casual, back of student visible
1boy, walking towards the student, holding beer bottle, confident stride, from behind
1boy, 1boy, ayu towering over the university student, holding beer bottle, student looking nervous, low angle, dramatic shadow
1boy, rough face, wide unrestrained smile, beer foam on lips, close-up, dramatic lighting
1boy, pointing with beer bottle at the noodle bowl, confident expression, water drops on bottle, mid shot

dialogues.speaker: AYU_ayu
dialogues.text:
看你餓得像隻
沒斷奶的小貓

dialogues.speaker: AYU_ayu
dialogues.text:
別廢話了
拿起筷子，趁熱吃！

panels.prompt: 1boy, raising beer bottle, toasting, night sky background, city lights, wide shot, emphasis lines

dialogues.speaker: AYU_ayu
dialogues.text: 來吧！

panels.prompt: 1boy, swallowing, picking up chopsticks nervously, looking at noodle bowl, close-up

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 咕

dialogues.speaker: sfx
dialogues.text: 吞

panels.prompt: 1boy, eating first bite of noodles, wide eyes, expression of surprise and awe, close-up, steam, delicious looking food

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text:
瞬間，濃郁的柴魚高湯
與辛辣蒜泥完美交織

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text: 極度細膩、深邃且溫柔的美味

panels.prompt: 1boy, back shot, stirring noodles, giant pot, steam, night, street corner, long shot, hook for next chapter

dialogues.speaker: narration
dialogues.text:
夜還很長
這個街角的煙火氣
才正要開始。
